svg.desc: SUPERSEDED — MCP Servers column schema superseded. DS §16 FLAG-002. Do not use as a build target. See DS §16 FLAG-002. Component: Settings Page (ConfigFlagsForm + ProviderList + McpServerList) Page: /settings Design system version: 1.6 (2026-03-08) Artboards: desktop 1440px — three stacked frames (General, Providers & Models, MCP Servers)

g.text: Enable verbose debug output in server logs. Use only in development.
Log additional detail for every agent step and API call.
Automatically rewrite user prompts to improve agent reasoning quality.
Run independent tool calls concurrently to reduce latency.
Compress older context to stay within the model's context window.
↑ "Switch to" action is on the Models table below — NOT on the Providers table above
Action column header and "Switch to" buttons absent for non-admin users
"Switch to" button: Loader2 spinner, opacity-50, disabled state
Empty state: "No MCP servers configured." (text-sm text-zinc-500, centered)
Interaction states: Switch toggling → opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed during mutation; health check → Loader2 spinner replaces Activity icon
